# init(apiVersion:options:)

**Initializer**

Initializes an instance of `ITLibrary` that can retrieve media entities.

## Declaration

```swift
init(apiVersion requestedAPIVersion: String, options: ITLibInitOptions) throws
```

## Parameters

- **requestedAPIVersion**: The version of the iTunesLibrary API that the app is requesting. Provide `"1.0"` if unknown.
- **options**: Options that change the initialization behavior. See [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibInitOptions].

## Return Value

An [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibrary] instance that can retrieve media entities, or `nil` if the method fails.

## Discussion

Unless you specify the [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibInitOptions/lazyLoadData] option, the system reads and parses the default iTunes database for the current user during initialization of the [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibrary] class. All media entities cache in memory until deallocation of the object occurs.

## Essentials

- **init(apiVersion:)**: Initializes an instance of [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibrary] that can retrieve media entities.
- **ITLibInitOptions**: These constants describe initialization options for an iTunes library.
